kind.description: Metadata used by portal/tooling/etc to render different UX experiences for resources of the same type.

CollaborationMember.description: Configuration details of the collaboration members.

signature.description: Signature of the member (member identifier signed using the member private certificate).

certificatePem.description: Gets or sets the public certificate of the member in PEM format.

consortiumEndpoint.description: Gets or sets the CCF endpoint.

consortiumServiceCertificatePem.description: Gets or sets the CCF public service certificate in PEM format.

member.description: Gets or sets the collaboration member.

provisioningState.description: Gets or sets the provisioning state.

ManagedOnBehalfOfConfiguration.description: Managed-On-Behalf-Of configuration properties. This configuration exists for the resources where a resource provider manages those resources on behalf of the resource owner.

MoboBrokerResource.description: Managed-On-Behalf-Of broker resource. This resource is created by the Resource Provider to manage some resources on behalf of the user.

id.description: Resource identifier of a Managed-On-Behalf-Of broker resource

ResourceTags.description: Object containing resource tags for patch operations.
